models.title: Linea Satin Black Single Panel Frameless Shower Screen
source_fields:
The Linea Satin Black Single Panel Frameless Shower Screen makes your shower the focal point of the bathroom and provides the ultimate solution for your shower project. Glass is treated with DreamLine exclusive ClearMax water repellant and stain resistant coating for superior protection and easy maintenance.

  • Frame Type: frameless
  • Door Type: screen
  • Walk In-Door Opening Height: 100
  • Walk In-Door Opening Width: 22
  • Door Installation: reversible
  • Door Handle Type: n/a
  • Adjustable Width: no
  • Glass Type: clear
  • Glass Color: clear
  • Hardware Color: black
  • 1 year limited

Important: All measurements should be taken only AFTER walls are finished (tile, back walls, etc.).  Professional installation recommended.

models.title: Dade Matte Black Bypass Sliding Shower Door
source_fields:
The Dade Collection by DreamLine is a budget-friendly semi-frameless sliding bypass shower door featuring a super sleek headrail for a modern design that will complement a variety of bathroom styles. The Dade Matte Black Bypass Sliding Shower Door offers unparalleled value with 3/16 in. certified clear tempered glass, smooth gliding rollers, and an integrated towel bar for convenience.

  • Model Size: 56-60 in. W x 70 3/8 in. H
  • This product comes in the Matte Black finish for SKU 101464402
  • Glass Type: Clear
  • Double sliding bypass configuration allows entry to the shower from left or right side; Reversible for a right or left installation
  • Integrated towel bar for convenience; Top and bottom guiderails can be trimmed up to 4 in. for width adjustment
  • 3/16 in. (5 mm) certified tempered glass; Aluminum water guards accommodate up to 1/4 in. for out-of-plumb (uneven) walls
  • Drilling into the threshold is optional for installation of this product; Professional installation recommended
  • Minimum threshold depth of 1 1/2 in. is required for proper installation
  • Lifetime Limited Manufacturer Warranty; Three (3) Year All Hardware Finishes Warranty
